title: Amtech – 145mm Rasp Plane, Lightweight Multi-Material Shaping Tool for Wood, Aluminium, Fibreglass & Rubber, Ergonomic Block Plane Rasp for DIY & Carpentry Finishing
features: MULTI-MATERIAL USE: Shapes wood, aluminium, fibreglass and rubber for carpentry, craft and DIY finishing work.
LIGHTWEIGHT CONTROL: Aluminium body reduces fatigue, helping you maintain accuracy during shaping tasks.
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable handle improves balance and control when smoothing edges or trimming surfaces.
COMPACT 145MM SIZE: Easy to manoeuvre in tight areas, making it ideal for modelling, pipework shaping or repairs.
DIY & TRADE READY: A practical rasp plane for block plane-style shaping, installation jobs and finishing applications.
description: Product Description Shape and smooth with confidence using this 145mm Amtech rasp plane. Ideal for wood, aluminium, fibreglass and rubber, it provides controlled trimming for DIY, craft and light trade work. The aluminium body keeps weight low, while the ergonomic handle improves grip and accuracy. A versatile finishing tool for carpentry, modelling, installation and general shaping tasks.
